9.anchor: And I want women to be modest in their appearance.
9.note: Or to pray in modest apparel.

12.anchor: I do not let women teach men or have authority over them.
12.note: Or teach men or usurp their authority.

15.anchor: But women will be saved through childbearing,
15.note: Or will be saved by accepting their role as mothers, will be saved by the birth of the Child.

1.anchor: This is a trustworthy saying: “If someone aspires to be a church leader,

2.anchor: So a church leader must be a man whose life is above reproach. He must be faithful to his wife.
2.note: Or must have only one wife, must be married only once; must be the husband of one wife;

3.anchor: He must not be a heavy drinker
3.note: Greek must not drink too much wine;

6.anchor: A church leader must not be a new believer, because he might become proud, and the devil would cause him to fall.
6.note: Or he might fall into the same judgment as the devil.

11.anchor: In the same way, their wives
11.note: Or the women deacons. women wives.

16.anchor: Without question, this is the great mystery of our faith

2.anchor: These people are hypocrites and liars, and their consciences are dead.

5.anchor: For we know it is made acceptable

6.anchor: If you explain these things to the brothers and sisters,

10.anchor: This is why we work hard and continue to struggle,
10.note: Some manuscripts read continue to suffer.

4.anchor: Don’t let them waste their time in endless discussion of myths and spiritual pedigrees. These things only lead to meaningless speculations,
4.note: Greek in myths and endless genealogies, which cause speculation.

4.anchor: which don’t help people live a life of faith in God.
4.note: Greek a stewardship of God in faith.

10.anchor: The law is for people who are sexually immoral, or who practice homosexuality, or are slave traders,

1.anchor: Never speak harshly to an older man,

9.anchor: A widow who is put on the list for support must be a woman who is at least sixty years old and was faithful to her husband.
9.note: Greek was the wife of one husband.

10.anchor: She must be well respected by everyone because of the good she has done. Has she brought up her children well? Has she been kind to strangers and served other believers humbly?
10.note: Greek and washed the feet of God’s holy people?

17.anchor: Elders who do their work well should be respected and paid well,
17.note: Greek should be worthy of double honor.

22.anchor: Never be in a hurry about appointing a church leader.
22.note: Greek about the laying on of hands.

2.anchor: If the masters are believers, that is no excuse for being disrespectful. Those slaves should work all the harder because their efforts are helping other believers
